query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A low-angle close-up portrait of a person with closed eyes and short, spiky hair at the crown of the head. A direct warm amber light illuminates the center of the face, highlighting the forehead, nose, cheeks, and chin, while the sides of the face and the surrounding background are enveloped in darkness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A low-angle close-up portrait of a person with closed eyes and short, spiky hair, rendered with aggressively harsh lighting that creates severe hard shadows and bright specular hotspots on the forehead, nose, and cheeks. Extreme exposure crushes the background and peripheral facial features into pure black while pushing central highlights toward overexposure. An intense orange-red color cast shifts the skin tone into an unsettling, sickly hue, and the skewed upward perspective destabilizes the composition.
